flags.message: A local filename search intended to locate pre-decision material displayed the path of a later Supreme Court event involving the same named parties. I did not open that event or use its existence in the prediction, but it is outcome-adjacent subsequent history and is disclosed so evaluators can discount the cell if appropriate.

The provisioned snapshot contains no district-court judgment, merits briefing, or stay submissions, while both CourtListener and ranged-corpus retrieval failed before returning results. The prediction is consequently driven primarily by the First Circuit base rate.
